nasb.text: When those hired first came, they thought that they would receive more; but each of them also received a denarius.

esv.text: Now when those hired first came, they thought they would receive more, but each of them also received a denarius.

cnv.text: 最先作工的人也來了，以為會多得一點，但每個人也是領到一個銀幣。

ccb.text: 最早来的工人来领的时候，以为必定可以多得一点工钱，谁知也各得一个银币。

csbs.text: 那些最先被雇的人也来了，以为会得到更多，可是他们每人也只领到一个银币。
